title: GPARS Agent Capability Manifest
description: Machine-readable declaration of required MCP servers and permissions for a general-purpose agent.

id.description: Unique identifier for the agent within its operational domain.

required_mcp_servers.description: List of MCP servers required for the agent to function as intended.

server_id.description: Canonical identifier from an official MCP registry.

version.description: Semantic version constraint for the server (e.g., >=1.0.0).

permission_scopes.description: List of permission scopes required for this server. Scopes are server-defined and opaque to GPARS.

optional_mcp_servers.description: Optional MCP servers that enhance agent capabilities. The agent may operate without them.

server_id.description: Canonical identifier from an official MCP registry.

version.description: Semantic version constraint for the server (e.g., >=1.0.0).

permission_scopes.description: List of permission scopes required for this server.

extensions.description: Optional extension metadata. Keys SHOULD use reverse-domain notation to avoid collisions.
